page1Title:
"In the middle of the battlefield,
Arjuna fell silent."
page1Subtitle:
There is a question in you
that no human can answer.
page2Subtitle:
Your divine friend is here.
Ready to listen. Ready to guide.
page3Title:
The Bhagavad Gita is not a text.
It is a conversation.
page3Subtitle:
Ask what you have always
been afraid to ask.
page4Title:
Your inner enemies are known.
Your dharma is waiting.
page5Subtitle:
Encrypted. Private. Yours alone.
Kiaanverse never reads your journal.
welcomeA11y: Welcome, dear friend. KIAAN walks beside you.
welcomeIntroPart2: — your divine friend on the path to inner peace.
welcomeBodyPart1: As Krishna walked with Arjuna through the
welcomeBodyPart2: , I walk with you — not as master, but as Sakha.
verseEnglish: “The restless mind is mastered through practice and detachment.”
palettePickerSubtitle: Each scheme dresses the whole app.
